_description: Manager role querying a client not in the database — all tools return no_data. Brief must handle gracefully without fabricating data.
prompt: Prepare me for my meeting with Acme Manufacturing Ltd.

crm_output.message: No Salesforce accounts found matching 'Acme Manufacturing Ltd.'. Verify the account name matches exactly in Salesforce.

payments_output.message: No completed payment transactions found for the requested client in the last 360 days. Verify the client name matches the bank party name exactly.
